textByHash.023fe082a098824ce5c7444e259f096d70388386: Solus. I thought you dead many moons past...
textByHash.4d127be5001394dcdbbd310a32e8b5f4edc05e98: Cut the banter, Solus. What do you want? You know you are not welcome here.
textByHash.225f35e119e7486b0d4dee3dc143b62833b0c7a1: You are not a Zamorakian! You worship nothing but your own selfish greed.
textByHash.022942a1baee476c2e7fc6121c10ad56d9356b23: You left because your own stupidity brought the wrath of the Temple Knights upon you. Now I ask you a final time before I draw my blade: WHAT do you WANT?
textByHash.b962001b36a9b519d15cab1dc17ba0f8de370721: The Kinshra are not your personal soldiers Solus! I will not waste any of my warriors in your foolish schemes!
textByHash.f5b0cb4cf75a0aeb6f7c9dbf19ea80547fbcc0c2: Leave. Now. Or there will be blood shed between us.
textByHash.dd8c0096971607cf21bde9b26acb333bf7d26cac: I swear... in the name of [cough] Zamorak... I will see you rot for this Solus...
textByHash.8198285347f0e48fca90109a353cc6270dbd3d57: What want you with lord of Kinshra? Speak!
textByHash.e3fa2788454d4480938b3a35cddf6b2fdbf8b952: Pah! Begone, fool, or prepare to taste my blade!
textByHash.a7d1dc79938e2d8aba590c0cb287f04e00cdf410: A friend of mine? What friend of mine would the Temple Knights show any intere-
textByHash.efddba9ed6d9dc9275916d5aef164ac45420341e: Oh. This... Is about Solus, isn't it?
textByHash.55d434a76cfa9c9c472f4c8de4452362bdae8fc7: Then let me assure you, that monster is no 'friend' of mine - if indeed such a creature even has 'friends'!
textByHash.3859f1d1b73756c9ca307d59108d3baf39b1f68f: No, that man is certainly no friend of mine nor the Kinshra.
textByHash.0739926438bdee24ba5b4e315e580a069be0a0f6: No fool... You and your White Knight cronies are no friend of the Kinshra either.
textByHash.662836fb0bcde2986ae48d8156d6505034e76e9b: I will help neither of you, and I wish you all a slow and painful death.
textByHash.5ae0729903fd0a85d138ae70056b8434619bb0f0: Is that a threat, whelp? Do your worst. I care not for my own life, I stand only for the protection of the Kinshra!
textByHash.798e6150ca39a9943651751fe7458d635805cfd0: What want you, with the Lord of the Kinshra? Speak!
textByHash.ffe328c80865c96a9b2e1b963779e63859d88cd9: Well you will not hear that from me, White Knight dog!
textByHash.e80c8a219b0cf2a8673f961272e785127c6218a5: And you can threaten me all you want, I care for nothing in this world save the welfare of my Kinshra brothers!
textByHash.7dc97bcd5a91eb0d3f958c6bc5ed0b810539bb48: Stop! I will tell you what you want! Please... leave my men be...
textByHash.6cda08fe7a7ee5abb8391e621b304d73b0cc7de9: [sigh] I should have known the White Knights would be my ruin once again...
textByHash.ed1a304883f7fffdbfb04f7dd506c4db5176c716: I do not know his exact whereabouts, and when last we met we did not leave...on the best of terms.
textByHash.8a5d98c6fe7bf6da5ff121e675b918aa3ce8dd96: All I know is that he left behind some fur when he left, I would expect him to be in an area with furred creatures of some sort.
textByHash.8cbeef4b7e5c14077fd152649e36b11b13ce893f: I do not know, I am a warrior, not a zoo keeper. It was not bear fur, I know that much.
textByHash.b5d2e07542fe922a1973327f2c88b212efd626d4: I have already told you, I know nothing except that he left some fur behind.
textByHash.da2bca2bf9a6a7ed0d5f7769a0de0524e0e4fc27: Now leave me and my men be, or it will be the worse for you!
textByHash.f055fbbe0866853beaa56eeaa75bc752d8efdd69: Then begone knave, before I have my Knights put you to the sword!
